title: 9 Herbal Teas For Eye Swelling
description: Ginkgo biloba teas contains flavonoids and terpenoids, which are powerful antioxidants that help reduce inflammation and swelling. The flavonoids, specifically quercetin and kaempferol, have anti-inflammatory properties that specifically target the blood vessels and reduce swelling around the eyes. When taken as a tea, these compounds work to increase blood flow and reduce puffiness by constricting the blood vessels and reducing fluid accumulation.  To use Ginkgo biloba tea for eye swe...
